title: HealthGuard
description: Never accidentally not notice when you're low or don't have a totem in your offhand
body:
# HealthGuard

A Minecraft Fabric mod that provides visual warning overlays when your health is low or when you have a totem of undying in your inventory but not equipped in your offhand.

## Features

### Low Health Warning Overlay

When your health drops below a configurable threshold, a red warning overlay will flash on your screen to alert you of the danger.

- **Configurable Health Threshold** - Set at what health level the warning triggers (1-20 hearts)
- **Adjustable Flash Speed** - Control how fast the overlay flashes (0.5x - 10x speed)
- **Customizable Transparency** - Adjust minimum and maximum alpha levels for the flash effect

### Totem Warning System

HealthGuard monitors your totem of undying and warns you when you have one in your inventory but haven't equipped it in your offhand slot.

- **Visual Overlay** - White flashing overlay when totem is in inventory but not offhand
- **Warning Icon** - An animated warning icon appears above the offhand slot with a bobbing animation
- **Independent Settings** - Configure flash speed, transparency, and icon animation separately from the health warning

## Configuration

All settings can be adjusted in-game through the ModMenu config screen.

### Low Health Settings

| Setting | Default | Range | Description |
|---------|---------|-------|-------------|
| Enabled | true | On/Off | Toggle the low health overlay |
| Health Threshold | 6 | 1-20 | Health level that triggers the warning |
| Flash Speed | 2.0 | 0.5-10.0 | Speed of the flashing animation |
| Min Alpha | 50 | 0-255 | Minimum opacity of the overlay |
| Max Alpha | 200 | 0-255 | Maximum opacity of the overlay |

### Totem Settings

| Setting | Default | Range | Description |
|---------|---------|-------|-------------|
| Enabled | true | On/Off | Toggle the totem warning system |
| Flash Speed | 2.0 | 0.5-10.0 | Speed of the white overlay flash |
| Min Alpha | 50 | 0-255 | Minimum opacity of the overlay |
| Max Alpha | 200 | 0-255 | Maximum opacity of the overlay |
| Icon Bob Speed | 1.5 | 0.5-5.0 | Speed of the warning icon bobbing |
| Icon Bob Height | 3 | 1-10 | Height of the warning icon bobbing |

## Dependencies

- **NebsConfigLib** - Required for configuration management
- **ModMenu** - Optional, for in-game configuration UI
